name: note
description: Generic note: a portable text-bearing thing. Notes are first-class movable objects so they can travel between rooms, actor inventories, bulletin boards, and other containers without losing identity. Subclass for richer behaviors (pinboard pins, recipe notes, voting notes, decision logs); the base shape is text plus readers/writers permissions.

classes.description: A movable text artifact. The text is a list of strings, one per line. Default is publicly readable; writability is gated by owner, the writers list, or wizard. Encryption and mailme bridges are deferred to v0.2.

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { let base = this.name; if (!base) { base = to_string(this); } let summary = this:text_summary(96); let preview = summary["preview"]; if (preview) { return base + ": " + preview; } return base; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let summary = this:text_summary(96); return { id: this, title: this:title(), description: this.description, lines: summary["lines"], location: location(this) }; }

verbs.name: text_summary
verbs.source: verb :text_summary(limit) rxd { if (!this:is_readable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot read note", value: this }; } let cap = limit; if (typeof(cap) != "number") { cap = 96; } if (cap < 0) { cap = 0; } if (cap > 512) { cap = 512; } let lines = this.text; let count = length(lines); let preview = ""; if (count > 0 && typeof(lines[1]) == "string") { preview = lines[1]; } let truncated = false; if (length(preview) > cap) { if (cap > 3) { preview = str_slice(preview, 1, cap - 3) + "..."; } else { preview = str_slice(preview, 1, cap); } truncated = true; } return { "lines": count, "preview": preview, "truncated": truncated }; }

verbs.name: text
verbs.source: verb :text() rxd { if (!this:is_readable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot read note", value: this }; } return this.text; }

verbs.name: read
verbs.source: verb :read() rxd { let text = this:text(); observe({ type: "note_read", actor: actor, note: this, text: text, ts: now() }); return text; }

verbs.name: set_text
verbs.source: verb :set_text(lines) rx { if (typeof(lines) != "list") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_text requires a list of strings", value: lines }; } if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot write note", value: this }; } this.text = lines; observe({ type: "note_edited", actor: actor, note: this, text: lines, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: write
verbs.source: verb :write(line) rx { if (typeof(line) != "string") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "write requires a string", value: line }; } if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot write note", value: this }; } this.text = this.text + [line]; observe({ type: "note_edited", actor: actor, note: this, text: this.text, ts: now() }); return length(this.text); }

verbs.name: erase
verbs.source: verb :erase() rx { if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot erase note", value: this }; } this.text = []; observe({ type: "note_edited", actor: actor, note: this, text: [], ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: delete
verbs.source: verb :delete(line) rx { if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot edit note", value: this }; } let lines = this.text; let n = length(lines); if (typeof(line) != "number" || line < 1 || line > n) { raise { code: "E_RANGE", message: "line out of range", value: line }; } let next = []; let i = 1; for entry in lines { if (i != line) { next = next + [entry]; } i = i + 1; } this.text = next; observe({ type: "note_edited", actor: actor, note: this, text: next, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: match_names
verbs.source: verb :match_names() rxd { let out = []; if (!this:is_readable_by(actor)) { return out; } let lines = this.text; for line in lines { if (typeof(line) == "string") { let trimmed = str_trim(line); if (trimmed) { out = out + [trimmed]; } } } return out; }

verbs.name: is_writable_by
verbs.source: verb :is_writable_by(actor_obj) rxd { if (this.owner == actor_obj) { return true; } if (has_flag(actor_obj, "wizard")) { return true; } if (actor_obj in this.writers) { return true; } return false; }
